auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Supabase personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in the Supabase dashboard: https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens.

actions.name: create_project_api_key
actions.description: Create a publishable or secret API key for a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

name.description: The API key name. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores; it must start with a lowercase letter or underscore.

type.description: The type of API key to create.

description.description: The optional description for the API key.

reveal.description: Whether to reveal the full API key value in the response.

secretJwtTemplate.description: The JWT template for secret API keys.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a project API key.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

type.description: The type of the API key.

prefix.description: The prefix portion of the API key.

hash.description: The hash of the API key.

anyOf.description: The description of the API key.

apiKey.description: The full API key value when reveal is true and Supabase returns it.

insertedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

anyOf.description: The JWT template for secret API keys.

actions.name: delete_project_api_key
actions.description: Delete a Supabase project API key.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

apiKeyId.description: The unique identifier of the project API key.

reveal.description: Whether Supabase should reveal key data in the delete response.

wasCompromised.description: Whether the key is being deleted because it was compromised.

reason.description: Optional deletion reason sent to Supabase.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a project API key.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

type.description: The type of the API key.

prefix.description: The prefix portion of the API key.

hash.description: The hash of the API key.

anyOf.description: The description of the API key.

apiKey.description: The full API key value when reveal is true and Supabase returns it.

insertedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

anyOf.description: The JWT template for secret API keys.

actions.name: delete_project_secrets
actions.description: Bulk delete secrets from a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

names.description: The names of secrets to delete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting project secrets.

success.description: Whether Supabase accepted the secret delete request.

actions.name: generate_typescript_types
actions.description: Generate TypeScript database types for a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

includedSchemas.description: Database schemas to include, such as public or auth.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for generating TypeScript types.

actions.name: get_edge_function
actions.description: Get metadata for one Supabase Edge Function by slug.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching an Edge Function.

function.description: A JSON object returned by Supabase.

actions.name: get_organization
actions.description: Get details for a Supabase organization by slug.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching an organization.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

plan.description: The subscription plan of the organization.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get detailed metadata for a Supabase project by project ref.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters identifying a Supabase project.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

organizationId.description: The organization ID this project belongs to.

region.description: The cloud region of the project.

status.description: The current status of the Supabase project.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was created.

anyOf.description: The release channel of the database.

actions.name: get_project_api_key
actions.description: Get one API key record from a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

apiKeyId.description: The unique identifier of the project API key.

reveal.description: Whether to reveal the full API key value.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching one project API key.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

type.description: The type of the API key.

prefix.description: The prefix portion of the API key.

hash.description: The hash of the API key.

anyOf.description: The description of the API key.

apiKey.description: The full API key value when reveal is true and Supabase returns it.

insertedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

anyOf.description: The JWT template for secret API keys.

actions.name: get_project_health
actions.description: Check health for selected services in a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

items.description: A Supabase service name to check health for.

timeoutMs.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds, up to 10000.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking project service health.

name.description: A Supabase service name to check health for.

healthy.description: Deprecated upstream health flag. Prefer status when present.

error.description: The service health error message when present.

services.description: The health results returned by Supabase.

actions.name: list_available_regions
actions.description: List Supabase regions available for creating projects in an organization.

continent.description: Optional continent code for regional recommendations.

desiredInstanceSize.description: Optional desired instance size for availability.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing available project regions.

regions.description: A JSON object returned by Supabase.

actions.name: list_edge_functions
actions.description: List Edge Functions in a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters identifying a Supabase project.

items.description: A JSON object returned by Supabase.

functions.description: The Edge Functions returned by Supabase.

actions.name: list_organization_members
actions.description: List members of a Supabase organization.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing organization members.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the member.

userName.description: The display name of the member.

email.description: The email address of the member.

roleName.description: The organization role name of the member.

mfaEnabled.description: Whether the member has MFA enabled.

actions.name: list_organization_projects
actions.description: List projects in a Supabase organization with optional search and pagination.

offset.description: The number of projects to skip.

limit.description: The maximum number of projects to return, up to 100.

items.description: The current status of the Supabase project.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing organization projects.

status.description: The current status of the Supabase project.

items.description: A project returned from an organization listing.

count.description: The total number of matching records.

limit.description: The maximum number of records returned.

actions.name: list_organizations
actions.description: List the organizations available to the authenticated Supabase account.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

anyOf.description: The URL slug of the organization.

actions.name: list_project_api_keys
actions.description: List API keys for a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

reveal.description: Whether to reveal the full API key values.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing project API keys.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

type.description: The type of the API key.

prefix.description: The prefix portion of the API key.

hash.description: The hash of the API key.

anyOf.description: The description of the API key.

apiKey.description: The full API key value when reveal is true and Supabase returns it.

insertedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

anyOf.description: The JWT template for secret API keys.

actions.name: list_project_secrets
actions.description: List secrets configured for a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters identifying a Supabase project.

value.description: The secret value when Supabase returns it.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the secret was last updated.

secrets.description: The project secrets returned by Supabase.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List Supabase projects visible to the authenticated account.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

organizationId.description: The organization ID this project belongs to.

region.description: The cloud region of the project.

status.description: The current status of the Supabase project.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was created.

anyOf.description: The release channel of the database.

actions.name: list_storage_buckets
actions.description: List Storage buckets for a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters identifying a Supabase project.

items.description: A JSON object returned by Supabase.

buckets.description: The Storage buckets returned by Supabase.

actions.name: run_read_only_query
actions.description: Run a SQL query through Supabase as the read-only database user.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

query.description: The SQL query to run with read-only permissions.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for running a read-only SQL query.

result.description: The raw read-only query response returned by Supabase, or null when Supabase returns no response body.

actions.name: update_project_api_key
actions.description: Update the name, description, or JWT template for a Supabase project API key.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

apiKeyId.description: The unique identifier of the project API key.

name.description: The API key name. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores; it must start with a lowercase letter or underscore.

reveal.description: Whether to reveal the full API key value in the response.

anyOf.description: The updated JWT template for secret API keys.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a project API key.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

type.description: The type of the API key.

prefix.description: The prefix portion of the API key.

hash.description: The hash of the API key.

anyOf.description: The description of the API key.

apiKey.description: The full API key value when reveal is true and Supabase returns it.

insertedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

anyOf.description: The JWT template for secret API keys.

actions.name: upsert_project_secrets
actions.description: Bulk create or update secrets for a Supabase project.

projectRef.description: The Supabase project reference, for example 'abcdefghijklmnopqrst'.

name.description: The secret name. It must not start with the reserved SUPABASE_ prefix.

items.description: A secret name/value pair to upsert.

secrets.description: The secrets to create or update.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for upserting project secrets.

success.description: Whether Supabase accepted the secret upsert request.
